iterations.feedback:
```<critique>
1. Format: OK
2. 3. Opponent plausibility: The other player asked for more, so offering 50 might still be too low. Increasing to 60 could make it more likely to be accepted.
4. Consistency: OK
5. Rule compliance: OK
</critique>
